## Roku Stock Argued to Be 41% Undervalued Despite Active Privacy Settlement Overhang

The privacy settlement overhang appears to be the primary valuation discount driver; if resolved, it could act as a re-rating catalyst, but absent new fundamental signal this is a valuation opinion, not a business event.

- Coverage claims ROKU may be approximately 41% undervalued at current levels — figure is from the headline.
- Privacy settlement cited as an active legal overhang weighing on sentiment.
- No new business metrics or operational catalyst cited; undervaluation claim is opinion-based.
- Medium classifier confidence; single outlet.
